upasarga_meanings.meaning: saMtapta honA jalanA jalAnA tapta karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pratapantamivAdityaM rAjye sTitamarindamam' (rA॰2.105.9) uBayatra praSabdaH prakarze'narTako vA
'pratapaM jyotizA tamaH' (f॰9.108.12) aqaBAvaSCAndasaH prAtapaM prakarzeraRAdIpayam udajvalayam ityarTaH
sa pratApaH praBAvaSca yattejaH kozadaRqajam ityamaraH
'divApi mayi nizkrAnte santapyete gurU mama' (sAvitryu॰5.83) santapyete=dUyete=duHKyataH
'yadataptaM praRamati na tatsantApayantyapi yacca svayaM nataM dAru na tatsantApayantyapi..' iti ca tatrEva pAWAntaraM mAtfkAsu
'santaptAyasi saMsTitasya payaso nAmApi na SrUyate' (Bartf॰2.67) santaptam=atyuzRam=prajvalat
'mahadezAvatapati carantI gozu gOrapi' (aTarva0 (12439) avatapati=avo'DaH tapati saMtaptaM karoti
'avatapte nakulasTitaM tavEtat' (pA0 2147) ityatra vfttAvudAharaRam kzepe gamyamAne prayogaH cApalametat anavasTitatvaM tavEtadityarTaH atrAvaSabdastApasya nyUnatAmAha avataptam=Izattaptam
'nizwaptaM rakzo nizwaptA arAtayaH' (vA0 saM0 1759) niHSezaM taptA ityarTaH nistapati svarRaM svarRakAraH punaH punastapatItyarTaH
'yasyA mamABizekArTaM mano viparitapyate' (rA0 gore0 2193) atyantaM tapyate saMjvaratItyAha
'SaM te sUrya Atapatu' (aTarva0 8214) Atapatu BAtu BAsatAm prakASatAm
'tadAhurniSocati nitapati varzizyati vA iti' (CAM0 u0 7111) nitarAM tapatItyarTaH
'uttapati svarRaM svarRakAraH' (pA0 1327) sUtre vfttiH uttapate raviH uddIpyata ityarTaH uttapate pARim uttapate pfzWam tapatItyevArTaH nArTa udA
'aniSaM nijErakaruRaH karuRaM kusumezuruttapati yadviSiKEH' (SiSu0 967) uttapati santApayati pIqayati kadarTayati
'pratyUhaH sarvasidDInAmuttApaH praTamaH kila' (hitopa0 345) uttApaH santApaH KedaH saMjvaraH
'tasmAt kimaBitapyantaM vAkSarErupakfntasi' (BA0 droRa0 15127) aBitapyantaM duHKyantam dUyamAnam
'aBitaptamayopi mArdavaM Bajate kEva kaTA SarIrizu' (raGu0 843) aBitaptam uttaptam santaptam samyak tApaM prAptam
'indrAvaruRAvaByA tapanti mAGAnyaryo vanuzAmarAtayaH' (f0 7835) aByAtapanti sarvato bADante aGAni kartfRi
'yadi dattvA varO rAjanpunaH pratyanutapyase' (rA0 21236) anutapyasa ityevArTaH pratirnAntaramarTe karoti
'taM SApamanusaMsmftya paryatapyata BfSaM tadA' (BA0 Adi0 18226) paryatapyata duHKito'Bavat durmanA aBUt
'ke svIkftA na vizayAH paritApayanti' (hitopa0 3116) paritApayanti BfSaM duHKayanti
'prasakte nirvARe hfdaya paritApaM vahasi kim' (mAla0 31) paritApo vyaTA vedanA
'AhitAgniScedupatapet' (ASva0 gf0 411) upatapet=upatapyeta upatapto rugRaH syAt AmayaScettaM vindet
'sa kiM mAmetadupatapasi yo'hamanena na prezyAmi' (CAM0 u0 3167) upatapasi rujasi sAmayaM karozi akuSalinaM sampAdayasi mAndyaM me janayasi
'yadi dIkzitasyopatapet' (Sa0 brA0 12352) yadi dIkzitasya sato yajamAnasya SarIrAvayave rujA syAdityAha
'mAnasena hi duHKena SarIramupatapyate ayaHpiRqena taptena kumBasaMsTamivodakam' (BA0 vana0 225).. upatapyate rujyate uzRI Bavati
'upataptodakA nadyaH palvalAni sarAMsi ca' (rA0 2595) upataptodakAH SuzkodakAH
'tAnIzad ivopatapya' (Sa0 brA0 25214) tAnatuzAn yavAn kiMcitsozmaRaH sampAdya
'vivakzitaM hyanuktamupatApaM janayati' (SA0 3) upatApa ADiH mAnasI vyaTA
'upatApI vasIyAnBUtvA'nnamicCati' (Sa0 brA0 8521) upatApI upatApavAn rugRaH AturaH
